name: Memory Stack — Daily Health Check
description: Daily READ-ONLY memory-stack health: hot-file capacity, entry pressure, temporal drift, memory-cron statuses, state.db sizes, semantic/auto-extract. Green/yellow/red. Exit 0 even when RED (alerts are in the content). Replaces the noisy every-6h capacity monitor (pause cron 6aabc8745056). 6 AM, away from the 3:35-4 AM memory-cron cluster. Never touches the gateway/Telegram.
